parameters.query:
UPDATE application_pre_employment
SET dbs_submitted_at = NULL, dbs_completed_at = NULL, dbs_status = 'not_required', dbs_type = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE dbs_status IN ('cleared') AND dbs_completed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

UPDATE application_pre_employment pe
SET dbs_submitted_at = NULL, dbs_completed_at = NULL, dbs_status = 'not_required', dbs_type = NULL, updated_at = NOW()
FROM applications a
WHERE pe.application_id = a.id AND a.is_active = false AND a.resolved_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' AND pe.dbs_status != 'not_required';

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'applications_submitted', COUNT(*), jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at >= DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) - INTERVAL '1 day'
  AND applied_at < DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW())
GROUP BY pipeline_track
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'response_rate',
       CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
           ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 1)
       ELSE 0 END,
       jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY pipeline_track
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'ghosting_rate',
       CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
           ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome = 'ghosted')::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 1)
       ELSE 0 END,
       jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY pipeline_track
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'median_days_to_response',
       COALESCE(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (
           ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (acknowledged_at - applied_at)) / 86400
       ), 0),
       jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE acknowledged_at IS NOT NULL AND applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND acknowledged_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
GROUP BY pipeline_track
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'pipeline_depth', COUNT(*),
       jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track, 'state', current_state),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE is_active = true
GROUP BY pipeline_track, current_state
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'source_response_rate',
       CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
           ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 1)
       ELSE 0 END,
       jsonb_build_object('source', COALESCE(discovery_source, 'unknown')),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY discovery_source
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'cv_version_response_rate',
       CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
           ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_state NOT IN ('applied', 'ghosted'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 1)
       ELSE 0 END,
       jsonb_build_object('cv_version', COALESCE(cv_version_id::text, 'unknown')),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND cv_version_id IS NOT NULL
  AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY cv_version_id
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
SELECT 'funnel_conversion',
       CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN
           ROUND(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE highest_state_reached IN ('interviewing', 'assessment', 'offer_received', 'negotiating', 'pre_employment', 'accepted'))::numeric / COUNT(*)::numeric * 100, 1)
       ELSE 0 END,
       jsonb_build_object('track', pipeline_track, 'stage', 'applied_to_interview'),
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily'
FROM applications
WHERE applied_at IS NOT NULL
  AND applied_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
GROUP BY pipeline_track
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO pipeline_metrics (metric_name, metric_value, dimensions, period_start, period_end, period_type)
VALUES ('total_active_applications',
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM applications WHERE is_active = true),
       '{}'::jsonb,
       DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()), DATE_TRUNC('day', NOW()) + INTERVAL '1 day', 'daily')
ON CONFLICT (metric_name, period_start, period_type, dimensions)
DO UPDATE SET metric_value = EXCLUDED.metric_value, calculated_at = NOW();
